nasb.text: Now He was telling them a parable to show that at all times they ought to pray and not to lose heart,

esv.text: And he told them a parable to the effect that they ought always to pray and not lose heart.

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們講一個比喻，論到人必須常常祈禱，不可灰心。

ccb.text: 耶稣讲了一个比喻来教导门徒要常常祷告，不要灰心。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们讲了一个比喻，说他们必须常常祷告，不要丧胆。
